title: rosa canina subvar. macroacantha
intro: Rosa canina subvar. macroacantha, also known as the prickly rose or dog rose, is a subspecies of the Rosa canina species that is characterized by its sharp, prickly stems and fragrant flowers. The medicinal properties of this plant include its high content of vitamin C, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina subvar. macroacantha include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds, fever, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicinal products such as rose hip tea and rose hip oil.
